session.user: Run prettier --check on docs/learned/testing/fakes-directory-structure.md and report results.
session.assistant: I'll run prettier to check the formatting of that file.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on fakes directory structure doc

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: File is correctly formatted according to Prettier code style.
